summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Auto-Mixer Subscription feature. All 11 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified Settings page tabs, Auto-Mixer component rendering, gated access for non-logged users, and full subscription UI for authenticated users.
seed_data_creation: Created test subscriptions with prefix TEST_automixer_ for backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auto-Mixer subscription feature fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints all return 200: /api/auto-mixer/config (config), /api/auto-mixer/create-subscription (POST), /api/auto-mixer/subscription/{address} (GET), /api/auto-mixer/update-window (POST - requires active subscription), /api/auto-mixer/funds-stats (GET). Frontend Settings page has 4 tabs (General, Auto-Mixer, Audio, Account). Auto-Mixer shows gated message for non-logged users, full subscription UI for logged in users with time selectors, visual timeline, and subscribe button.

backend: GET /api/auto-mixer/config - returns correct config (monthly_fee=30, max_window=6h, mixes_per_hour=2)
POST /api/auto-mixer/create-subscription - creates pending subscription with window selection
GET /api/auto-mixer/subscription/{address} - returns subscription status or null
POST /api/auto-mixer/update-window - requires active subscription (returns 404 for pending)
GET /api/auto-mixer/funds-stats - returns real-time fund distribution stats
Validation: Window must be 1-6 hours (invalid window returns 400)
Idempotency: Creating subscription twice returns existing subscription with flag
frontend: Settings page loads with 4 tabs: General, Auto-Mixer, Audio, Account
All tabs are clickable and switch content correctly
Auto-Mixer tab shows gated access message when not logged in
Auto-Mixer subscription UI visible when logged in as guest user
Config display: 30 DOGE monthly fee, 6h max window, 2/hr auto-mixes
Time window selectors (Start Time, End Time) with UTC labels
Visual timeline showing selected window duration
Benefits list displayed (12 auto-mixes/day, flexible window, AI ingredient selection, earn while away)
Subscribe button with correct price text 'Subscribe for 30 DOGE/month'
Fund Distribution section visible with stats (Total DOGE, Buy & Burn 80%, Dev Fund 20%, Active Subscribers)

/api/auto-mixer/update-window.note: Requires active subscription - correctly rejects pending subscriptions

not_tested.payment_verification: Requires real DOGE transaction - intentionally not tested
not_tested.auto_mixing_background_task: Runs on schedule - requires active subscription and time passage
